form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Not seen since she finished last of 13 at Chantilly All Weather October 31 over 1400m, 16 len behind Pitch Perfect with 56kg at $21. On debut fourth of 9 at Chantilly June 24 over 1400m, 4 len behind Bandiagara with 55kg at $58. Capable of a big run.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd of 11 at Senonnes-Pouanc? on March 13 over 1350m, on rain affected going; 1.75 len behind Chica Suerte carrying 59kg at $15. Last start won by 0.5 len at Durtal March 22 over 1200m defeating Renversante with 56.5kg. Does rise 4kg on that win but still looks a solid chance.

form.formComment: Comes off a 46 day let-up. At the latest run 8th of 14 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 22 over 1500m, slow going 6 len behind Khalinskha with 54.5kg at $37. The race before that 5th of 11 at Marseille Vivaux on February 10 over 1500m, 1.75 len behind Misty City with 59kg at $6.10. Can do much better.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 7 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1300m, 6 len behind Homere with 58kg at $7.70. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at Chantilly All Weather on November 8 over 1600m, 11 len behind Mijas carrying 58kg at $21. Fitter and rates highly.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at Fontainebleau November 3 over 1200m, soft track; 4 len behind Asenseofserenity carrying 55.5kg at $9.60. On debut fifth of 8 at Vichy September 23 over 1400m, 5 len behind Khalinskha with 54.5kg at $9.20. Plenty of more attractive propositions in this race.

form.formComment: Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 13 at Le Crois?-Laroche on March 20 over 1800m, 5.5 len behind Aqua Aura carrying 58kg at $27. The run before that 6th of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 4 over 1500m, 8 len behind Balta with 54.5kg at $11. Needs to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 5th of 11 at Senonnes-Pouanc? on March 13 over 1350m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Chica Suerte with 56.5kg at $16. Second-up won by 2 len at Nantes March 31 over 1400m on a rain affected track defeating Leha with 56.5kg at $7.70. Bold showing expected again.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 36-day let-up. Most recently won by a head at Marseille Vivaux March 4 over 1500m defeating Iria Chope with 54.5kg at $10. The run before that 4th of 12 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 21 over 1300m, 4.5 len behind Nekketsu carrying 52.5kg at $73. Capable enough on his day and can make it two in a row.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Lyon-Parilly November 7 over 2000m, soft track; 11 len behind Yacomo carrying 54.5kg at $13. First up last campaign second last of 8 at Lyon-la-Soie October 3 over 1800m, 3.5 len behind Masaya carrying 58kg at $11. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Freshened for 39 days. Resuming from last on the turn 4th of 8 at Marseille Vivaux on February 16 over 1500m, 2.5 len behind Be My Person carrying 56.5kg at $11. Second-up second last of 9 at Cavaillon on March 1 over 1600m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Nuevo Quartz with 58kg. Happy to take him on today.

form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a neck at Mont-de-Marsan March 23 over 1200m defeating Premiera carrying 54kg at $72. The race before that second last of 13 at Bordeaux on March 10 over 1400m, 14 len behind Claudia Chop with 54.5kg at $121. Shapes as a chance again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up got back early 8th of 13 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 24 over 2150m, 9 len behind Ti Amo Bello carrying 54kg at $41. Second run from a spell 6th of 13 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 1800m, 1.75 len behind Merveille with 54.5kg at $79. Out of her depth.
